document_id: Corporate Tax Private Letter Ruling CPLR 2012-01

findings.description: The footer address block has been incorrectly moved to the top of the page.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the address and contact information is located at the bottom of the page. In the HTML, it appears immediately below the Governor and Secretary names near the top.

findings.description: Black redaction boxes are missing, altering the text's visual meaning and readability.
findings.evidence: The PDF contains numerous black rectangles indicating redacted text (e.g., 'Dear [block]:'). The HTML omits these entirely, leaving confusing gaps (e.g., 'Dear :').

findings.description: Black redaction boxes are missing, altering the text's visual meaning and readability.
findings.evidence: The HTML omits the black redaction rectangles present in the PDF, resulting in broken sentences (e.g., 'owns and operates a on in').

findings.description: Black redaction boxes are missing, altering the text's visual meaning and readability.
findings.evidence: The HTML omits the black redaction rectangles present throughout the PDF text.

findings.description: Black redaction boxes are missing, altering the text's visual meaning and readability.
findings.evidence: The HTML omits the black redaction rectangles present throughout the PDF text.

findings.description: Black redaction boxes are missing, altering the text's visual meaning and readability.
findings.evidence: The HTML omits the black redaction rectangles present throughout the PDF text.

findings.description: Black redaction boxes are missing, including those over the signature area.
findings.evidence: The HTML omits the black redaction rectangles present in the PDF, including the large blocks at the end of the letter.

findings.description: The redaction blocks (black boxes) representing the signature area on page 6 are missing from the HTML.
findings.evidence:
In the PDF, page 6 contains large black redaction boxes directly below the word 'Sincerely,'. The HTML concludes with '

Sincerely,

' but does not include any tags or styled elements to represent these visual redactions.
